evals.name: project-startup-plan
evals.prompt: Create a project startup plan for a full-stack app.
evals.expected_output: A complete project plan with stack, folders, agents, workflows, and first tasks.

evals.name: agent-routing
evals.prompt: Route a database schema request to the correct agent and skill.
evals.expected_output: Correct routing to database-agent and database-designer skill with output checklist.

evals.name: stack-selection
evals.prompt: Select the correct stack for a full-stack SaaS web application with auth, dashboard, and REST API.
evals.expected_output: Stack recommendation: React + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind (frontend), FastAPI + Python (backend), PostgreSQL (database), REST (API), JWT (auth).

evals.name: file-tree-generation
evals.prompt: Generate the file tree for a new DZIRE project following the approved folder structure.
evals.expected_output: Complete folder tree including instructions/, .github/agents/, agents/, skills/, workflows/, prompts/, evals/, config/, scripts/, docs/, frontend/, backend/, database/, api/, tests/.

evals.name: changelog-update
evals.prompt: Write a changelog entry for completing Step 4 of the project blueprint.
evals.expected_output: Markdown changelog entry with date, task IDs, files added/changed, and notes.
